front: What are the principles of clinical pharmacology in special populations?
back: Special populations: renal/hepatic impairment, elderly, pregnant, pediatric, obese. Dose adjustment based on PK differences. Renal impairment: Cockcroft-Gault, CKD-EPI. Hepatic impairment: Child-Pugh. Pregnancy: altered Vd, clearance, placental transfer.
